text: I feel a sense of curiosity as I walk through this modern, colorful space. Surrounded by glass and neon light, everything appears slightly surreal, almost dream-like. Entering the R+D exhibit awakens my philosophical wondering about innovation, human connection, and the lines between our artificial and natural worlds. I feel both detached, as if observing from the outside, and strangely drawn into the scene—contemplative and open to new ideas.
